title: The Armies Rush Toward Alubarna
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on the armies rush toward alubarna, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Armies Rush Toward Alubarna. Vivi’s desperate attempts to stop the fighting are drowned out by the chaos Crocodile engineered. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Why don't we put an end to these games,

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I can't hit him at all...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Are pirates in completely different leagues...!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Nicely spotted... Had you been hit by that attack, you'd be saying a lot more than "ouch"...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Devil fruit powers can be extremely strong in battle,

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Depending on how you use it and how long you've trained with it.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Unlike those fools who're satisfied merely by having a devil fruit power,

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I've honed my powers to perfection...!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: I'll make you soon regret ever going up against me!

summary: This part develops the armies rush toward alubarna and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
